title: Possible to re-assign person in People column with one-click?
excerpt:
I want to be able to re-assign the person in a People column in a single click in the dropdown menu. 
Right now, if the People column isn’t restricted, selecting another person from the dropdown will just add them as an …

posts.author: sorenl (Soren Laulainen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to be able to re-assign the person in a People column in a single click in the dropdown menu.

Right now, if the People column isn’t restricted, selecting another person from the dropdown will just add them as an additional assignee. And if the column is restricted to just 1 person, selecting another person from the dropdown throws an error message that “the column is limited to one person.”

In order to reassign, I have to click to remove the currently assigned person, and then click again to select a new person

posts.author: TRLeyden (Tom Leyden)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have an integration that will do that - happy for you to test and confirm if it will work for you…

image1129×264 14.5 KB

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sorenl
I think VLOOKUP app can help you by creating a repository board (for example with person column and status with person name) auto link it to multiple boards so when status is selected, a person will be assigned. Here is a 90 sec demo similar usecase. Let me know if you need any help
